title: Earth Spheres
description: Spheres dividing planet Earth into subsystems, which are collectives of (physical) matter sharing specific traits.

definitions.definition: Spheres dividing planet Earth into subsystems, which are collectives of (physical) matter sharing specific traits.
definitions.examples:
- Atmosphere
- Hydrosphere
- Cryosphere
- Biosphere
- Lithosphere
- Anthroposphere
